name: swim-report
description: Estimated beach hazard flag status for US beaches — swim.report

scripts.seed: deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write scripts/discovery-batch.js --out ./.seed.sql --no-classify && npx wrangler d1 execute swim-report --local --file ./.seed.sql
scripts.seed:classify: deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write scripts/discovery-batch.js --out ./.seed.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute swim-report --local --file ./.seed.sql
